case_title: GWEN FOLEY et al VS. NICHOLAS C. KONTIS et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLEY, GWEN SERVED JUN-29-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KONTIS, NICHOLAS C.
